allowed_uses: record public idea metadata and source timestamps
classify whether an idea contains executable rules or prose-only thesis
propose offline replay hypotheses with ambiguities retained
bias_risks: prose ideas may be non-executable or edited after publication
popularity and recency are not performance evidence
missing stop, sizing, or exit semantics can make replay invalid
notes: Public ideas are untrusted research inputs, not signals to follow.
Copyrighted text must not be copied into artifacts beyond minimal citation metadata.

edited_or_deleted_visibility.value: Some public pages show updated markers; deletion visibility is not guaranteed from the listing surface.

entry_exit_rule_visibility.value: Mixed. Some ideas are prose-only; others expose rule-like entry, target, stop, or trade-management details.

published_at_or_observed_at.value: Idea pages may expose publication/update metadata; per-idea timestamps must be captured from individual URLs.

signal_direction_or_thesis.value: Public idea pages can include directional thesis text, long/short tags, entry zones, take-profit levels, and stop-loss levels.

symbol.value: Public idea/category pages cover variable symbols and markets; exact symbol must be captured per individual idea URL.

source_title: TradingView Ideas public strategy and analysis feed
validation_prerequisites: canonical strategy spec or non-spec signal replay record
